title: Formspec Verification Receipt
description: Structured verification result from the crypto-verifier port (ADR-0088). Produced by a Verifier adapter; consumed by WOS admission and Trellis integrity checks.

result.description: Verification outcome. verified: cryptographic check passed. failed: check attempted and rejected. unsupported: adapter cannot evaluate this method.

x-lm.intent: Tri-state result of the primitive cryptographic verification.

method.description: The signature-method URI from the registry that was used for verification.

x-lm.intent: Registry method URI that this receipt certifies.

methodRegistryVersion.description: SemVer of the signature-method registry document at verification time.

x-lm.intent: Registry version used during verification so future readers can resolve the method state.
Identifies the adapter that produced this verification receipt.

id.description: URI identifying the adapter that produced this receipt.

version.description: SemVer of the adapter at verification time.

x-lm.intent: Identifies the signing key used in verification.

ref.description: Key identifier KID, thumbprint, or DID reference to the signing key.

version.description: Optional version of the key material referenced.

snapshot.description: Optional snapshot of the key bytes at verification time.

verifiedAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when verification was performed.

x-lm.intent: Timestamp of verification enables staleness detection.

context.description: Optional verification context including revocation, timestamping, and witness data.

responseHash.description: Hash of the revocation response bytes.

receiptHash.description: Hash of the timestamp receipt bytes.

anchor.description: Trellis anchor reference for the witness attestation.

eventHash.description: Trellis canonical_event_hash of the witness event.

receiptBytes.description: OPTIONAL base64-encoded COSE_Sign1 signed receipt. Present when the adapter has a signing key and posture requires receipt signing.
